element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Instant course changes and low-speed flight without falling
Primary damage output against early enemies
Navigation through tunnel entrances/exits; craft survives some collisions
Alternative to guns; expanded weapon variety
Passive tracking capability against fast-moving targets
High-speed evasion, trades fire capability for speed
Investigation of planet metamorphosis and Sy Wickens subplot

typical_tension_triggers: Lack of time limit creates self-paced tension
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast, high-energy action sequences with self-paced mission structure; no time limits allow for exploration-based rhythm breaks between combat encounters

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret tunnels and hidden ships indicate optional exploration areas; map structure allows branching paths
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Tunnels and hidden collectible ships reward spatial exploration outside primary mission corridor

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core flight mechanics and basic enemy engagement; safe weapon selection and navigation checkpoints
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Expansion of weapon variety (homing missiles); increased enemy complexity; boss encounters at planet transitions
difficulty_curve.late_game: Episode 3 focuses on supercomputer X.I. threat; Proxima Seven condensed to 2 stages; optional hidden mission with metamorphosis plot
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (end of Episode 1, Planet 1)
Proxima Seven (final confrontation, condensed level count)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 27 missions contains multiple sequential objectives: enemy destruction > tunnel navigation > checkpoint passage > extraction point. Creates point-to-point flow with optional branching for secrets.
Each of 9 planets culminates in a mandatory boss encounter before progression to next episode or mission completion.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: End of each planet (e.g., Episode 1 Planet 1)

notable_level_patterns.description: Tunnel sequences allow collision survival and afterburner-based high-speed evasion; terrain provides tactical cover and complexity.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Secret tunnel areas throughout all episodes

notable_level_patterns.description: Secret tunnels and hidden ships placed in explorable areas encourage spatial deviation from primary mission route.
Proxima Seven (final planet) contains only 2 stages instead of 3, creating compressed tension and narrative urgency.
